summary: Iteration 128: Rewards System Phase 1 & Phase 2 - All features working. Tested LeaderboardPage with podium view, period toggle (monthly/alltime), full rankings table. Tested MyRewardsPage with filtering, pagination, CSV export, streak tracking. All backend API endpoints verified (10/10 tests passed). Both sidebar navigation links visible for admin users.

issues: Console warnings about DialogContent missing DialogTitle for accessibility (pre-existing issue from iteration 127)

critical_code_review_comments: LeaderboardPage properly handles both monthly and alltime periods with different data sources
MyRewardsPage filter panel has comprehensive time period and activity type filters
Both pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Sidebar correctly includes 'leaderboard' in alwaysInclude list for visibility
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing test data in rewards_leaderboard collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rewards Phase 1 & 2 fully tested. LeaderboardPage at /leaderboard shows podium for top 3, period toggle, rankings table. MyRewardsPage at /my-rewards shows points summary, streak tracking, history with filters. Backend endpoints: /api/rewards/leaderboard/full (public), /api/rewards/summary (public), /api/rewards/history (JWT auth required). Leaderboard data mostly contains 'Anonymous' test users with Rizza M. as the real user at rank #5.

features: Podium display for top 3 (Crown, Medal, Award icons)
Period toggle between 'This Month' and 'All Time'
Full rankings table with Rank, User, Level, Points, Change columns
User rank card showing current position and distance to next rank
Points Balance card with USDT estimate
Level card with progress bar to next level
Monthly Rank card with distance to next position
Points History table with Date, Type, Source, Points, Balance
Time Period filters (All Time, 7 Days, 30 Days, 90 Days, Custom)
Activity Type filters (Trading, Deposits & Withdrawals, Referrals, etc.)
